burn.name: Burn
burn.desc: Take 1 fire damage per turn for 4 turns. Strength is reduced by 2 while burning.

poison.name: Poison
poison.desc: Escalating toxin damage over 3 turns: 1 damage, then 2, then 3.

acid_corrosion.name: Acid Corrosion
acid_corrosion.desc: Corrosive acid eats through armour: reduce Physical Defence by 1 each turn for 5 turns (stack -1 per turn on the sheet). No direct HP damage unless the GM adds it.

incapacitated.name: Incapacitated
incapacitated.desc: Cannot take actions. Covers stun, knockout, daze and similar hard-control effects.

immobilized.name: Immobilized
immobilized.desc: Cannot move, but can still attack/cast if otherwise able. Covers freeze, entangle and paralysis-like roots.

mind_controlled.name: Mind Controlled
mind_controlled.desc: Mental control variant. Fear forces movement away; charm prevents attacks against the charmer.

weakened.name: Weakened
weakened.desc: All major stats are reduced by 2 while active. Combines slow, weak and confused style effects.

cursed.name: Cursed
cursed.desc: Hexed: -2 Accuracy and -1 Magic Power for 8 turns. Using Stamina abilities also costs 1 extra Stamina while cursed.

regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.desc: Restore 2 HP per turn for 5 turns. Also grants immunity/resistance to poison and disease while active.

hp_regen.name: HP Regen
hp_regen.desc: Restore 1 HP at the start of each turn for 5 turns (Process Turn).

stamina_regen.name: Stamina Regen
stamina_regen.desc: Restore 1 Stamina at the start of each turn for 5 turns (Process Turn).

mana_focus.name: Mana Focus
mana_focus.desc: Restore 1 Stamina at the start of each turn while a staff or wand is equipped (Mana Focus passive).

enhanced.name: Enhanced
enhanced.desc: Physical enhancement: Strength +2, Speed +2 and Physical Defence +2 while active.

empowered.name: Empowered
empowered.desc: +3 Magic Power for 6 turns. Magical toggle skills cost 1 less Stamina per turn (minimum 1).

weapon_enchanted.name: Weapon Enchanted
weapon_enchanted.desc: Weapon attacks deal +1d6 elemental damage (fire, ice, lightning, or radiant — chosen when applied) for 10 turns.

protected.name: Protected
protected.desc: +3 Physical Defence and +3 Magical Defence for 6 turns. Represents a ward that absorbs incoming blows.

spell_warded.name: Spell Warded
spell_warded.desc: +4 Magical Defence for 8 turns. Immune to Charm, Fear, and Weakened from magical sources while active.

enhanced_mobility.name: Enhanced Mobility
enhanced_mobility.desc: +2 Speed for 10 turns. Immune to Immobilized while active. Can ignore difficult terrain at normal Speed.

stealth_mastery.name: Stealth Mastery
stealth_mastery.desc: Invisible/hard to target and resistant to mental effects. Perfect sneaky-gremlin mode.

intimidating_aura.name: Intimidating Aura
intimidating_aura.desc: Aura (30ft): enemies starting their turn nearby must resist Fear or cannot move toward you willingly.

toxic_presence.name: Toxic Presence
toxic_presence.desc: Aura (15ft): enemies nearby take 1 poison pressure damage per turn on Process Turn; allies in the aura gain Poison Immunity while you are the source.

fear.name: Fear
fear.desc: Target must move away, cannot willingly approach, or takes disadvantage while facing the source.

charm.name: Charm
charm.desc: Target cannot attack the charmer and may treat them as friendly until harmed or the effect ends.

silenced.name: Silenced
silenced.desc: Cannot use voice-based spells, commands, shouts, or sound effects.

blinded.name: Blinded
blinded.desc: Cannot see. Attacks and perception relying on sight are heavily penalised.

knockdown.name: Knockdown
knockdown.desc: Knocked prone for 1 turn: -2 Accuracy and cannot move until you spend an action to stand.

poison_immunity.name: Poison Immunity
poison_immunity.desc: Immune to poison damage and poison status effects.

poison_resistance.name: Poison Resistance
poison_resistance.desc: Poison damage is halved and you cannot gain new Poison stacks while this lasts. Existing Poison still ticks.

disease_immunity.name: Disease Immunity
disease_immunity.desc: Immune to disease and poison-based debuffs except legendary sources.

fire_resistance.name: Fire Resistance
fire_resistance.desc: Take half fire damage and cannot gain Burn while this is active. Existing Burn still ticks.

undead_bane.name: Undead Bane
undead_bane.desc: Attacks against undead deal +1d6 radiant damage and have +2 Accuracy against undead targets.

burn_on_hit.name: Burn On Hit
burn_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Burn for 4 turns — 1 fire damage per turn and -2 Strength.

freeze_on_hit.name: Freeze On Hit
freeze_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Immobilized for 3 turns — cannot move but may still attack.

wind_slash.name: Wind Slash
wind_slash.desc: Release a 20ft wind blade for 1d6 slashing damage and push the target 10ft on a hit.

bleeding.name: Bleeding
bleeding.desc: Bleeding wound: lose 1 HP at the start of each turn for 3 turns. Bandaging ends the effect early.

dragon_fire.name: Dragon Fire
dragon_fire.desc: Attack deals +1d6 fire damage. On hit, 75% chance to apply Burn. Frightened targets take +1 extra fire damage.

poison_on_hit.name: Poison On Hit
poison_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Poison — escalating 1, then 2, then 3 damage over 3 turns.

stealth_strike.name: Stealth Strike
stealth_strike.desc: First attack from hidden gains +2 Accuracy and +1d6 damage. Breaks stealth after the attack.

critical_strike.name: Critical Strike
critical_strike.desc: Critical hits occur on a natural 19–20 and deal +1 weapon damage die on crits.

phase_strike.name: Phase Strike
phase_strike.desc: This attack ignores 3 points of Physical Defence and 3 points of Magical Defence.

shadow_step.name: Shadow Step
shadow_step.desc: Teleport up to 30ft between shadows or dim light. Does not provoke opportunity attacks.

time_strike.name: Time Strike
time_strike.desc: Once per scene: make an extra weapon attack immediately after this hit lands.

piercing.name: Piercing
piercing.desc: Ignore 2 points of cover or Physical Defence on this attack.

shock_on_hit.name: Shock On Hit
shock_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn on a failed endurance save.

nature_blessing.name: Nature Blessing
nature_blessing.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1 Magic Power in natural terrain for 8 turns. Restore 1 HP when you start a turn outdoors.

piercing_light.name: Piercing Light
piercing_light.desc: Attacks ignore darkness penalties and deal +1d4 radiant damage to shadow or undead targets.

lightning_arrows.name: Lightning Arrows
lightning_arrows.desc: Ranged attacks deal +1d6 lightning damage. On hit, 40% chance to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn.

star_arrows.name: Star Arrows
star_arrows.desc: Ranged attacks deal +1d6 radiant damage. +2 Accuracy while attacking in darkness.

armor_pierce.name: Armor Pierce
armor_pierce.desc: Reduce the target's Physical Defence by 2 for this attack only.

holy_strike.name: Holy Strike
holy_strike.desc: Attack deals +1d6 radiant damage. +2 Accuracy against undead, demons, and creatures of darkness.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.desc: 10ft burst: 2d6 earth damage and apply Knockdown to enemies who fail a Speed save.

thunder_strike.name: Thunder Strike
thunder_strike.desc: Attack deals +1d6 thunder damage. 40% chance to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn.

earth_shatter.name: Earth Shatter
earth_shatter.desc: Attack deals +1d8 earth damage and reduces target Physical Defence by 2 until end of next turn.

void_impact.name: Void Impact
void_impact.desc: Attack deals +1d6 void damage and pushes the target 10ft on a hit.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.desc: If this attack drops or crits, immediately deal half the rolled damage to one adjacent enemy.

double_strike.name: Double Strike
double_strike.desc: Make two attack rolls with the same action; the second hit uses the same modifiers but no extra once-per-turn bonuses.

lifesteal.name: Lifesteal
lifesteal.desc: Heal HP equal to half the damage dealt by this attack (rounded down, minimum 1).

rage_mode.name: Rage Mode
rage_mode.desc: +2 Strength and +2 Speed for 8 turns, but -1 Physical Defence while raging.

execution.name: Execution
execution.desc: Deal +1d6 damage against targets below half HP.

chaos_strike.name: Chaos Strike
chaos_strike.desc: Add +1d6 damage of a random element (fire, ice, lightning, or void) on each hit.

reality_cut.name: Reality Cut
reality_cut.desc: Once per scene: this attack ignores all defence and cover. Deals normal weapon damage + 2d6 force.

mana_efficiency.name: Mana Efficiency
mana_efficiency.desc: Toggle and active skills cost 1 less Stamina per turn for 10 turns (minimum 1).

drain_mana.name: Drain Mana
drain_mana.desc: Target loses 1d4+1 Stamina; you regain half that amount (rounded up).

elemental_mastery.name: Elemental Mastery
elemental_mastery.desc: +2 Magic Power and +1 Accuracy with elemental skills for 10 turns.

cosmic_power.name: Cosmic Power
cosmic_power.desc: +4 Magic Power and +2 Magical Defence for 6 turns. Legendary cosmic effects only.

creation_magic.name: Creation Magic
creation_magic.desc: +3 Magic Power for 8 turns. Can shape minor objects or barriers as a narrative effect.

reach.name: Reach
reach.desc: Melee reach increases by 5ft for 10 turns.

anti_cavalry.name: Anti Cavalry
anti_cavalry.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1d6 damage against mounted or charging targets.

sweeping_strikes.name: Sweeping Strikes
sweeping_strikes.desc: One melee attack may hit up to 2 adjacent targets at -1 Accuracy each.

dragon_slayer.name: Dragon Slayer
dragon_slayer.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1d6 damage against dragons and draconic creatures.

infinite_reach.name: Infinite Reach
infinite_reach.desc: Legendary: melee attacks reach 30ft with line of sight for 3 turns.

dimension_pierce.name: Dimension Pierce
dimension_pierce.desc: Legendary: ignore all physical barriers and 6 points of total defence once per scene.

damage_reduction.name: Damage Reduction
damage_reduction.desc: Reduce each incoming hit by 1 damage for 10 turns (minimum 0).

multiattack.name: Multiattack
multiattack.desc: Each turn, make 2 different attacks (each pays its own stamina cost).

quick_draw.name: Quick Draw
quick_draw.desc: You may attack with ranged weapons the same turn you move (others cannot).

mana_regeneration.name: Mana Regeneration
mana_regeneration.desc: Restore 1 Stamina at the start of each turn while active.

fire_immunity.name: Fire Immunity
fire_immunity.desc: Immune to fire damage and Burn while active. Set duration from the item or skill.

cold_aura.name: Cold Aura
cold_aura.desc: Aura (15ft): enemies nearby lose 2 Speed. When an enemy enters or starts their turn in the aura, 40% chance to apply Immobilized.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.desc: +3 Accuracy on stealth attacks and +2 Speed when you did not attack last turn.

spell_absorption.name: Spell Absorption
spell_absorption.desc: Once while active: negate one spell targeting you and regain Stamina equal to that spell's cost.

light_aura.name: Light Aura
light_aura.desc: Aura (20ft): allies gain +1 Accuracy vs Fear and +1 Magical Defence. Undead in the aura take 1 radiant damage per turn (GM tracks on enemies).

haste.name: Haste
haste.desc: +2 Speed for 8 turns and +1 extra movement action each turn.

burn_aura.name: Burn Aura
burn_aura.desc: Aura (10ft): adjacent enemies take 1 fire damage per turn on Process Turn (track on enemies). 40% chance to apply Burn when they enter.

frost_aura.name: Frost Aura
frost_aura.desc: Aura (15ft): enemies lose 2 Speed nearby. 40% chance to apply Immobilized when they start their turn inside.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.desc: Ranged spell: 2d6 lightning damage in a line. 40% chance to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn on failed save.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.desc: Cannot be seen normally while active. +4 Accuracy on the first attack; ends if you attack or take damage. Set duration from the item or skill.

silent_movement.name: Silent Movement
silent_movement.desc: +3 Accuracy on stealth rolls and movement makes no sound for 5 turns.

immovable.name: Immovable
immovable.desc: Cannot be pushed, knocked down, or forcibly moved for 10 turns. +2 Physical Defence while planted.

flight.name: Flight
flight.desc: Fly at your normal Speed for 10 turns. Immune to ground-based Immobilized.

spell_resistance.name: Spell Resistance
spell_resistance.desc: +3 Magical Defence for 10 turns. Reduce incoming spell damage by half (round down).

stone_skin.name: Stone Skin
stone_skin.desc: +3 Physical Defence for 10 turns. Reduce mundane weapon damage by 1 per hit.

shadow_stealth.name: Shadow Stealth
shadow_stealth.desc: +4 Accuracy in dim light or darkness for 5 turns.

radiant_aura.name: Radiant Aura
radiant_aura.desc: Aura (20ft): allies gain +1 Magical Defence. Undead in the aura take 1 radiant damage per turn (track on enemies).

nature_resistance.name: Nature Resistance
nature_resistance.desc: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence in wilderness. Immune to poison plants and weather exhaustion.

mirror_image.name: Mirror Image
mirror_image.desc: The next 2 attacks against you have a 50% chance to hit an illusion instead (track uses manually).

critical_chance.name: Critical Chance
critical_chance.desc: Critical hits occur on natural 19–20 for 10 turns.

luck.name: Luck
luck.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1 Speed for 8 turns — fortune favours the bold.

magic_sight.name: Magic Sight
magic_sight.desc: +3 Accuracy to detect magic, traps, and hidden enchantments for 10 turns.

identify.name: Identify
identify.desc: Instantly identify magical items and active enchantments on touch (utility, not combat).

crush.name: Crush
crush.desc: +2 Strength for this attack and 40% chance to apply Knockdown on hit.

spell_memory.name: Spell Memory
spell_memory.desc: Prepare one additional spell or skill option until your next long rest (narrative +1 prepared ability).

keen_sight.name: Keen Sight
keen_sight.desc: Wilderness vigilance — +1 to spot hidden creatures, ambushes, or traps at range (you or allies on overwatch benefit).

steady_hands.name: Steady Hands
steady_hands.desc: +2 Accuracy on ranged and fine-tool actions for 10 turns.

long_range_sight.name: Long Range Sight
long_range_sight.desc: +2 Accuracy at long range; ignore the first range penalty band for 10 turns.

concentration.name: Concentration
concentration.desc: +2 Magic Power and +2 Magical Defence while you sustain a channeled spell, toggle stance, or similar ongoing ability.

heal_2.name: Heal 2
heal_2.desc: Instantly restore 2 HP when consumed or activated.

heal_5.name: Heal 5
heal_5.desc: Instantly restore 5 HP when consumed or activated.

heal_3.name: Heal 3
heal_3.desc: Instantly restore 3 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_2.name: Restore Stamina 2
restore_stamina_2.desc: Instantly restore 2 Stamina when consumed or activated.

heal_8.name: Heal 8
heal_8.desc: Instantly restore 8 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_5.name: Restore Stamina 5
restore_stamina_5.desc: Instantly restore 5 Stamina when consumed or activated.

heal_25.name: Heal 25
heal_25.desc: Instantly restore 25 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_15.name: Restore Stamina 15
restore_stamina_15.desc: Instantly restore 15 Stamina when consumed or activated.

heal_50.name: Heal 50
heal_50.desc: Instantly restore 50 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_30.name: Restore Stamina 30
restore_stamina_30.desc: Instantly restore 30 Stamina when consumed or activated.

cast_fireball.name: Cast Fireball
cast_fireball.desc: Cast Fireball: 3d6 fire damage in a 20ft burst. 75% chance to apply Burn to each failed save target.

heal_40.name: Heal 40
heal_40.desc: Instantly restore 40 HP when consumed or activated.

remove_poison.name: Remove Poison
remove_poison.desc: Remove Poison and all poison damage-over-time effects immediately.

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.desc: Instantly move up to 60ft to a visible location. Does not cost a movement action.

full_heal.name: Full Heal
full_heal.desc: Restore HP to your current maximum immediately.

remove_all_debuffs.name: Remove All Debuffs
remove_all_debuffs.desc: Remove all negative status effects and stat debuffs immediately.

fire_immunity_permanent.name: Fire Immunity Permanent
fire_immunity_permanent.desc: Permanent immunity to fire damage and Burn (legendary).

permanent_hp_5.name: Permanent HP 5
permanent_hp_5.desc: Permanently increase maximum HP by 5 after consumption.

permanent_strength_2.name: Permanent Strength 2
permanent_strength_2.desc: Permanently increase base Strength by 2 after consumption.

dragon_breath.name: Dragon Breath
dragon_breath.desc: Cone (30ft): 3d6 fire damage. 75% chance to apply Burn to each target in the cone.

permanent_all_stats_1.name: Permanent All Stats 1
permanent_all_stats_1.desc: Permanently increase Strength, Magic Power, Accuracy, and Speed by 1 after consumption.

regeneration_permanent.name: Regeneration Permanent
regeneration_permanent.desc: Permanent: restore 1 HP at the start of each turn (Process Turn). Legendary.

unlock_doors.name: Unlock Doors
unlock_doors.desc: +3 Accuracy on lockpicking and can bypass mundane non-magical locks with tools.

climb_assistance.name: Climb Assistance
climb_assistance.desc: +3 Accuracy on climbing checks and you cannot fall more than 10ft from a failed climb.

light_source.name: Light Source
light_source.desc: Bright light 20ft and dim light 40ft. Lasts until extinguished (utility).

fire_damage.name: Fire Damage
fire_damage.desc: Attacks deal +1d4 fire damage while this weapon effect is active.

undead_damage.name: Undead Damage
undead_damage.desc: Attacks deal +1d6 radiant damage to undead targets.

purify.name: Purify
purify.desc: Remove Poison, disease, and one minor curse from food, water, or a willing target.

parry_bonus.name: Parry Bonus
parry_bonus.desc: +2 Physical Defence when using a parry or block reaction for 8 turns.

crushing.name: Crushing
crushing.desc: +2 Strength for this attack and 40% chance to apply Knockdown on hit.

critical_bleeding.name: Critical Bleeding
critical_bleeding.desc: Critical hit causes deep bleeding: 2 HP lost per turn for 3 turns.

armor_piercing.name: Armor Piercing
armor_piercing.desc: Reduce target Physical Defence by 2 for this attack.

stunning.name: Stunning
stunning.desc: 40% chance on hit to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn.

magic_damage.name: Magic Damage
magic_damage.desc: Spells and magical attacks deal +1d4 magic damage while this effect is active.

critical_immunity.name: Critical Immunity
critical_immunity.desc: Critical hits against you become normal hits for 10 turns.

flexible_defense.name: Flexible Defense
flexible_defense.desc: +2 Physical Defence OR +2 Magical Defence each turn (choose at start of turn) for 8 turns.

void_damage.name: Void Damage
void_damage.desc: Attacks deal +1d6 void damage, effective against magical barriers.

life_steal.name: Life Steal
life_steal.desc: Heal HP equal to half the damage dealt by this attack (rounded down, minimum 1).

reflect_damage.name: Reflect Damage
reflect_damage.desc: When hit in melee, the attacker takes 2 damage back for 6 turns.

magic_barrier.name: Magic Barrier
magic_barrier.desc: +3 Magical Defence for 8 turns. The first magical hit each turn is reduced by 3 damage.

auto_healing.name: Auto Healing
auto_healing.desc: Restore 1 HP at the start of each turn while equipped or active.

critical_strikes.name: Critical Strikes
critical_strikes.desc: Critical hits on 19–20 and crits deal +1 damage die.

energy_waves.name: Energy Waves
energy_waves.desc: Melee attacks release a 15ft energy wave for 1d4 force damage to one secondary target.

damage_immunity.name: Damage Immunity
damage_immunity.desc: Legendary: immune to non-magical weapon damage for 3 turns.

titan_strength.name: Titan Strength
titan_strength.desc: +3 Strength and +2 Physical Defence for 8 turns. Heavy weapons deal +1 damage die.

ranged_training.name: Ranged Training
ranged_training.desc: +1 Accuracy while wielding a ranged weapon.

empty_hand_training.name: Striker Training
empty_hand_training.desc: +1 Accuracy while both hands are empty. Unarmed Basic Attack uses 1d4 + Strength.

striker_training.name: Striker Training
striker_training.desc: +1 Accuracy while both hands are empty. Unarmed Basic Attack uses 1d4 + Strength.

open_stance_passive.name: Open Stance
open_stance_passive.desc: +1 Speed and +1 Magical Defence while both hands are empty.

iron_palm_passive.name: Iron Palm
iron_palm_passive.desc: +1 Physical Defence while both hands are empty.

empty_hand_mastery_passive.name: Striker Mastery
empty_hand_mastery_passive.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1 Strength while both hands are empty.

striker_mastery_passive.name: Striker Mastery
striker_mastery_passive.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1 Strength while both hands are empty.

combat_stance.name: Combat Stance
combat_stance.desc: +1 Physical Defence while wielding a sword.

defensive_stance_buff.name: Defensive Stance
defensive_stance_buff.desc: Active stance: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence, but -1 attack damage.

iron_body_buff.name: Iron Body
iron_body_buff.desc: Active form: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence while both hands are empty.

berserker_rage_buff.name: Berserker Rage
berserker_rage_buff.desc: Active rage: +2 Strength and +2 Speed, but -1 Physical Defence.

fortress_stance_buff.name: Fortress Stance
fortress_stance_buff.desc: Active fortress stance: +4 Physical Defence and +4 Magical Defence.

stagger.name: Stagger
stagger.desc: Target is off-balance: -2 Accuracy and cannot use reactions until the end of their next turn.

exhausted.name: Exhausted
exhausted.desc: Overextended. -1 to all stats and cannot cast spells while exhausted.

staff_training.name: Staff Training
staff_training.desc: +1 Magic Power while wielding a staff.

light_step.name: Light Step
light_step.desc: +1 Speed and silent movement while wielding daggers.

dagger_mastery_passive.name: Dagger Mastery
dagger_mastery_passive.desc: +2 Speed while wielding daggers (Dagger Mastery passive).

spell_penetration.name: Spell Penetration
spell_penetration.desc: Spells ignore 2 points of Magical Defence.

mind_shield.name: Mind Shield
mind_shield.desc: Advantage on saves vs mind control, charm, fear, and illusions; halve magical damage from direct mental assaults (GM).

hammer_mastery_passive.name: Hammer Mastery
hammer_mastery_passive.desc: Immune to Incapacitated while Hammer Mastery is active.

elemental_mastery_passive.name: Elemental Mastery
elemental_mastery_passive.desc: All attacks deal +1d4 elemental damage of your chosen element; immunity to that element.

rapid_regeneration.name: Rapid Regeneration
rapid_regeneration.desc: Restore 3 HP per turn (Rapid Healing passive). Strong resistance to damage-over-time.

ice_resistance.name: Ice Resistance
ice_resistance.desc: Take half ice damage and cannot gain Immobilized from cold while active.

lightning_resistance.name: Lightning Resistance
lightning_resistance.desc: Take half lightning damage while active.

earth_resistance.name: Earth Resistance
earth_resistance.desc: Take half earth damage while active.

wind_resistance.name: Wind Resistance
wind_resistance.desc: Take half wind damage while active.

water_resistance.name: Water Resistance
water_resistance.desc: Take half water damage while active.

darkness_resistance.name: Darkness Resistance
darkness_resistance.desc: Take half darkness damage while active.

light_resistance.name: Light Resistance
light_resistance.desc: Take half light damage while active.

ice_weakness.name: Ice Weakness
ice_weakness.desc: Take double ice damage while active.

fire_weakness.name: Fire Weakness
fire_weakness.desc: Take double fire damage while active.

lightning_weakness.name: Lightning Weakness
lightning_weakness.desc: Take double lightning damage while active.

water_weakness.name: Water Weakness
water_weakness.desc: Take double water damage while active.

earth_weakness.name: Earth Weakness
earth_weakness.desc: Take double earth damage while active.

wind_weakness.name: Wind Weakness
wind_weakness.desc: Take double wind damage while active.

darkness_weakness.name: Darkness Weakness
darkness_weakness.desc: Take double darkness damage while active.

light_weakness.name: Light Weakness
light_weakness.desc: Take double light damage while active.

incapacitated_resistance.name: Incapacitated Resistance
incapacitated_resistance.desc: Resistance to Incapacitated and similar hard-control effects (Human Determination).

knockdown_resistance.name: Knockdown Resistance
knockdown_resistance.desc: Resistance to knockdown and prone effects (Dwarven Toughness).

shadow_affinity_passive.name: Shadow Affinity
shadow_affinity_passive.desc: +3 stealth in dim light or darkness; darkvision extends to 150ft.

career_rage_buff.name: Career Rage
career_rage_buff.desc: +2 Strength, −1 Magical Defence for 3 rounds (Berserker Rage action).

reckless_strike_buff.name: Reckless Strike
reckless_strike_buff.desc: Your next attack gains +2 damage; you suffer −2 Physical Defence until your next turn.

sacred_stance_buff.name: Sacred Stance
sacred_stance_buff.desc: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence; you cannot move.

battle_breakfast_pd_buff.name: Battle Breakfast (Defence)
battle_breakfast_pd_buff.desc: +1 Physical Defence for the first combat only.

battle_breakfast_init_buff.name: Battle Breakfast (Initiative)
battle_breakfast_init_buff.desc: +2 to initiative for the first combat only.

empower_ally_buff.name: Empowered
empower_ally_buff.desc: Next spell or magical attack +1d4 damage or +2 HP on heal.

shield_wall_buff.name: Shield Wall
shield_wall_buff.desc: Adjacent ally gains +1 Physical Defence until your next turn.

suppressing_fire_debuff.name: Suppressed
suppressing_fire_debuff.desc: −1 to attacks or movement for 1 round.

dirty_trick_buff.name: Dirty Trick Setup
dirty_trick_buff.desc: One ally gains +2 on their next attack against the distracted target.

volley_call_buff.name: Volley Called
volley_call_buff.desc: +1 on next attack against the called target.

field_fit_buff.name: Field Fit
field_fit_buff.desc: +1 on first attack roll or +1 Physical Defence for the first round.

clean_bandage_heal.name: Clean Bandage
clean_bandage_heal.desc: Stabilise downed ally and restore 1 HP.

fusion_field_spark_heal.name: Field Spark
fusion_field_spark_heal.desc: Stabilise downed ally — restore 1 HP and remove Stunned.

apprentice_smith.name: Apprentice Smith
apprentice_smith.desc: Forge basic weapons and armour for allies to equip.

weaponwright.name: Weaponwright
weaponwright.desc: Forge martial weapons. Weapons you forge gain +1 damage.

armourer.name: Armourer
armourer.desc: Forge armour and shields. Armour you forge grants +1 Physical Defence and +1 Magical Defence.

field_fit.name: Field Fit
field_fit.desc: Pre-combat: Battlefield fitting — tune ally gear (10 min); +1 first attack roll or +1 Physical Defence first round (choose one). Once per ally per long rest. + Harmony Reaction: same ally (2 Smiths → both bonuses).

master_alloy.name: Master Alloy
master_alloy.desc: Masterwork alloy recipes (mithril, adamantine). Gear you forge from these counts as masterwork.

tempered_steel.name: Tempered Steel
tempered_steel.desc: Allies wielding weapons or armour you forged gain +1 to physical attack rolls (weapon damage unchanged).

siege_breaker.name: Siege Breaker
siege_breaker.desc: Break mundane locks, hinges, or chains with smith's tools (GM: one object per use).

camp_cook.name: Camp Cook
camp_cook.desc: Hearty camp meals. Each meal restores 1d4+1 HP when eaten.

hearty_rations.name: Hearty Rations
hearty_rations.desc: Travel rations. After eating, +2 Stamina for 10 rounds.

spice_box.name: Spice Box
spice_box.desc: Camp provisioning — meals you cook restore +1 HP or last +1 round of meal buff duration.

second_serving.name: Second Serving
second_serving.desc: Camp provisioning — prepare one extra portion from the same ingredients (once per long rest).

banquet_planner.name: Banquet Planner
banquet_planner.desc: Feast for the party; shared +1 Accuracy for 20 rounds. + Harmony Reaction: same feast (each additional Chef adds +1 Accuracy and +5 feast duration; 9 Chefs → +9 Accuracy for 65 rounds).

battle_breakfast.name: Battle Breakfast
battle_breakfast.desc: Before first combat, one eater gains +2 initiative or +1 Physical Defence (first combat only). + Harmony Reaction: same meal (when 2+ Chefs, each served eater gets both bonuses; each Chef adds +2 initiative, +1 Physical Defence for one combat round, +1 Stamina round 1, and +1d4 temp HP at combat start; one eater per Chef).

chefs_instinct.name: Chef's Instinct
chefs_instinct.desc: Spoil and poison sense — detect spoiled, drugged, or poisoned food by taste or smell (GM may require no roll).

hands_in_soil.name: Hands in the Soil
hands_in_soil.desc: Common herbs and rations from farm goods. Passive: +1 HP from natural food.

crop_rotation.name: Crop Rotation
crop_rotation.desc: Reliable herb yields when resting in wilderness or farmland (GM: extra herb loot).

animal_sense.name: Animal Sense
animal_sense.desc: Notice disturbed earth, tracks, and grazing signs within 30ft.

preserve_harvest.name: Preserve Harvest
preserve_harvest.desc: Salves and preserved goods that don't spoil for a week.

green_thumb.name: Green Thumb
green_thumb.desc: Magical or rare plants (ties to herbalism recipes).

landmark_memory.name: Landmark Memory
landmark_memory.desc: Recall terrain — +2 on navigation checks in regions you've worked (GM).

bountiful_plot.name: Bountiful Plot
bountiful_plot.desc: Party gains +1 material find when looting plants/organics after a fight.

field_medic.name: Field Medic
field_medic.desc: Brew health potions. Potions you brew restore +2 HP when used.

triage.name: Triage
triage.desc: Triage and diagnosis — learn a creature's HP band, bleeding, poison, or disease before you treat (not exact HP unless GM allows).

antidote_training.name: Antidote Training
antidote_training.desc: Plague and poison warding on yourself — +2 effective Magical Defence vs poison and disease; identify poison on sight.

clean_bandage.name: Clean Bandage
clean_bandage.desc: Stabilise and revive — stabilise a downed ally (0 HP) so they do not worsen; restore 1 HP.

surgical_touch.name: Surgical Touch
surgical_touch.desc: Advanced potions and antidotes. Wound mending you apply to others restores +1d4 HP.

plague_ward.name: Plague Ward
plague_ward.desc: Allies within 10ft +1 Magical Defence vs disease and poison saves. + Harmony: +1 Magical Defence vs disease and poison per Medic with this aura in range (no Reaction).

revival_draft.name: Revival Draft
revival_draft.desc: Brew a rare revival draft — remove Incapacitated or one minor debuff (once per target per day).

acid_vials.name: Acid Vials
acid_vials.desc: Craft/throw: Volatile brew — on hit 1d6 acid; 40% Weakened. + Harmony Reaction: same target, same round (+1 acid damage per Alchemist).

smoke_and_flash.name: Smoke & Flash
smoke_and_flash.desc: Smoke and flash powder — cover a retreat or confuse foes; no damage.

label_reader.name: Label Reader
label_reader.desc: Reagent identification — safely identify unknown liquids and powders (poison, potion, or inert) before anyone uses them.

explosive_compounds.name: Explosive Compounds
explosive_compounds.desc: Volatile bombs (3d6 in 15ft; separate attack roll per target vs Magical Defence).

transmute_salts.name: Transmute Salts
transmute_salts.desc: Material transmutation — convert common materials into alchemical bases (GM: daily quota).

volatile_expert.name: Volatile Expert
volatile_expert.desc: You and allies take −1 damage from your own alchemical blasts (minimum 0).

rune_apprentice.name: Rune Apprentice
rune_apprentice.desc: Rune inscription — apply one minor enchant to gear (+1 stat or similar effect).

elemental_ink.name: Elemental Ink
elemental_ink.desc: Inscribe Fire, Ice, or Lightning +1d6 on a weapon (permanent enchant, not a toggle).

ward_scribe.name: Ward Scribe
ward_scribe.desc: Protective warding — inscribe charms granting +1 Magical Defence (permanent slot enchant on armour).

identify_magic.name: Identify Magic
identify_magic.desc: Arcane appraisal — inspect a magic item; learn properties and curse risk before anyone equips it.

soul_bind.name: Soul Bind
soul_bind.desc: Master engraving — soul-bind an item to its owner (others suffer −2 using it).

artifact_shaping.name: Artifact Shaping
artifact_shaping.desc: Master engraving — items you make gain 2 enchantment slots.

dispel_touch.name: Dispel Touch
dispel_touch.desc: Protective warding — suppress one hostile magical effect on an object or creature for 1 hour.

keen_eye.name: Keen Eye
keen_eye.desc: Scene examination — study a scene or object; GM reveals one clue tier. + Harmony Reaction: same scene (+1 clue tier per Detective).

trace_evidence.name: Trace Evidence
trace_evidence.desc: Spot disturbed objects, footprints, blood, or recent magic residue at a scene.

interview.name: Interview
interview.desc: Witness interrogation — +2 to read lies or pressure answers (GM social roll).

case_notes.name: Case Notes
case_notes.desc: Once per scene, reroll a failed investigation check.

reconstruct.name: Reconstruct
reconstruct.desc: Trail and timeline reconstruction — visualise recent events at a location (last 24 hours; wilderness, ruins, or camp — GM narrative).

follow_the_trail.name: Follow the Trail
follow_the_trail.desc: Determine which way a specific person or creature went within the last 8 hours.

deduction.name: Deduction
deduction.desc: Clue synthesis — connect two clues the party already knows; GM must give a useful inference if both are known.

artifact_study.name: Artifact Study
artifact_study.desc: Identify relics — true properties, era, curse flags.

ancient_tongues.name: Ancient Tongues
ancient_tongues.desc: Read common dead languages; translate inscriptions slowly.

trap_sense.name: Trap Sense
trap_sense.desc: +2 to notice ancient traps and structural weak points.

careful_extraction.name: Careful Extraction
careful_extraction.desc: Remove relic without triggering trap (GM check).

lost_technique.name: Lost Technique
lost_technique.desc: Once per adventure, recognise weakness vs undead/construct; party +2 damage for one fight. + Harmony: +1 party damage per additional Archaeologist on same enemy type same fight (no Reaction).

divine_dig.name: Divine Dig
divine_dig.desc: Sense consecrated/desecrated ground and major burials within 60ft.

replicate_relic.name: Replicate Relic
replicate_relic.desc: Reproduce a studied artifact's mundane copy (not full magic without Enchanter).

trail_warden.name: Trail Warden
trail_warden.desc: Wilderness tracking — follow tracks; know number and rough size of a group. Party ignores difficult undergrowth on overland travel (GM).

ambush_spotter.name: Ambush Spotter
ambush_spotter.desc: Snares and ambush — when you scout ahead for 1 minute, the party gains +1 initiative.

snare_craft.name: Snare Craft
snare_craft.desc: Set simple snares and alarm traps — GM sets DC and effect.

long_watch.name: Long Watch
long_watch.desc: Wilderness tracking — follow one quarry for a day; learn camp sites and direction of travel.

camouflage_net.name: Camouflage Net
camouflage_net.desc: Snares and ambush — camouflage a camp from casual search (+2 Stealth for the camp).

volley_call.name: Volley Call
volley_call.desc: Marked quarry — call out one target; one ally gains +1 on next attack vs it. Once per combat. + Harmony Reaction: same target (each Ranger adds +1 to marked allies' next attack and marks one more ally).

tinker.name: Tinker
tinker.desc: Basic tools, crossbow bolts, simple mechanisms.

clockwork_repair.name: Clockwork Repair
clockwork_repair.desc: Fix a jammed lock or stuck mechanism (GM).

reinforced_frame.name: Reinforced Frame
reinforced_frame.desc: Portable cover; +3 Physical Defence while behind it. + Harmony Reaction: same lane (+1 Physical Defence per additional Engineer).

schematic_mind.name: Schematic Mind
schematic_mind.desc: Understand how unfamiliar machines work after 1 minute study.

siege_kit.name: Siege Kit
siege_kit.desc: Breaching tools, pulleys, collapsible bridge sections.

overcharge.name: Overcharge
overcharge.desc: Boost ally's mechanical device — double effect once, then it is spent until rebuilt (GM).

demolition_plan.name: Demolition Plan
demolition_plan.desc: Shaped charges — target structure weak point (not creature HP).

haggler.name: Haggler
haggler.desc: Buy at 10% discount, sell at 10% premium (mundane goods).

appraise.name: Appraise
appraise.desc: True market value and obvious fakes on items.

ledger.name: Ledger
ledger.desc: Track party expenses; never "lose" change to bookkeeping errors (flavour + GM trust).

find_buyer.name: Find Buyer
find_buyer.desc: Locate a purchaser for unusual loot in a settlement (GM).

black_market.name: Black Market
black_market.desc: Access illegal or rare goods in cities (GM availability).

invest.name: Invest
invest.desc: Seed capital — chance of return after downtime (GM economy).

caravan_lead.name: Caravan Lead
caravan_lead.desc: Overland travel: −20% random encounter chance when you plan the route (GM).

well_read.name: Well Read
well_read.desc: Recall lore on a topic — GM gives one true fact.

bestiary_notes.name: Bestiary Notes
bestiary_notes.desc: Identify creature type — resistances, habits (not exact stat block unless GM).

map_archive.name: Map Archive
map_archive.desc: Copy or remember maps; never lost in mapped dungeons without magic.

forbidden_index.name: Forbidden Index
forbidden_index.desc: Know danger level of magic/curse on touch (safe study).

teach.name: Teach
teach.desc: Ally gains your tier-1 knowledge skill for one task this session. + Harmony Reaction: same ally, different topics (ally keeps each granted edge once; no cap on number of topics).

sages_conclusion.name: Sage's Conclusion
sages_conclusion.desc: Once per adventure, declare a lore-based solution — GM must make it viable if plausible.

train_mount.name: Train Mount
train_mount.desc: Tack and training — mount obeys commands in combat (GM companion rules).

scent_partner.name: Scent Partner
scent_partner.desc: Animal alerts to poison, disease, or hidden creature within 30ft.

veterinary.name: Veterinary
veterinary.desc: Stabilise beast; heal 1d6 HP or remove minor condition.

falcons_eye.name: Falcon's Eye
falcons_eye.desc: Send scout animal — report layout of area ahead (limited range).

pack_tactics.name: Pack Tactics
pack_tactics.desc: When you and a beast attack same target, +1 accuracy for both.

call_the_wild.name: Call the Wild
call_the_wild.desc: Summon mundane animals for distraction or transport (once per day, GM).

lay_blessing.name: Lay Blessing
lay_blessing.desc: Touch ally; +1 Magical Defence for 8 hours (once per ally per day). + Harmony Reaction: same ally, same day (+1 Magical Defence per Cleric blessing that ally).

last_rites.name: Last Rites
last_rites.desc: Prevent undead rise from bodies you sanctify.

comfort_the_dying.name: Comfort the Dying
comfort_the_dying.desc: Ally at 0 HP hears you — roll death saves twice, keep the better result (GM).

holy_symbol_craft.name: Holy Symbol Craft
holy_symbol_craft.desc: Symbols that grant +1 vs fear/mind control while worn.

turn_unholy.name: Turn Unholy
turn_unholy.desc: Warded area 10ft — undead/demons hesitate to enter (GM save).

sanctuary_camp.name: Sanctuary Camp
sanctuary_camp.desc: Short rest in consecrated camp; each ally removes one fear or charm. + Harmony Reaction: same camp (each ally removes one additional fear or charm per Cleric at that rest).

faiths_reservoir.name: Faith's Reservoir
faiths_reservoir.desc: Once per day, double HP restored by a potion you administer.

soldier_training.name: Soldier Training
soldier_training.desc: Armoured discipline — +1 Strength while wearing medium or heavy armour.

shield_wall.name: Shield Wall
shield_wall.desc: Shield formation — adjacent ally gains +1 Physical Defence until your next turn. + Harmony Reaction: same ally (each Soldier in the huddle adds +1 Physical Defence per Soldier helping — count heads, add that many once per Soldier; 3 Soldiers → +9 Physical Defence; 5 Soldiers on one ally → +25 Physical Defence).

rally_cry.name: Rally Cry
rally_cry.desc: Battlefield rally — one ally within 30ft may reroll a failed save (once per combat). + Harmony Reaction: that reroll (+2 for each participating Soldier; 5 Soldiers → +10 on the reroll).

hold_the_line.name: Hold the Line
hold_the_line.desc: Shield formation — +1 Physical Defence when an ally is within 10ft.

phalanx.name: Phalanx
phalanx.desc: Volley focus — when you and two or more allies attack the same target, all gain +1 accuracy. + Harmony: +1 accuracy on next hit vs that enemy per Phalanx Soldier in the volley; when 2+ Phalanx Soldiers attack, also +1d4 damage per Phalanx Soldier (all focus-fire attackers benefit; no Reaction).

second_wind.name: Soldier's Second Wind
second_wind.desc: Battlefield rally — restore 1d6 HP (once per short rest).

commanders_presence.name: Commander's Presence
commanders_presence.desc: Battlefield rally — allies within 10ft gain +1 to initiative.

arcane_study.name: Arcane Study
arcane_study.desc: Career support — allies you help with magic gain +1 effective Magic Power on buffs and heals you apply to them.

empower_ally.name: Empower Ally
empower_ally.desc: Spell empowerment — ally's next spell or magical attack gains +1d4 damage or heal +2 HP (once per ally per combat). + Harmony Reaction: same ally (when 2+ Mages, +1d6 damage or +3 HP instead).

mana_font.name: Mana Font
mana_font.desc: Arcane sustenance — allies within 10ft regain +1 Stamina when they cast a tier-1 spell (once per round per ally).

dispel_assist.name: Dispel Assist
dispel_assist.desc: Circle warding assist — grant an ally +2 on their next dispel or cleanse attempt (GM).

amplified_healing.name: Amplified Healing
amplified_healing.desc: Amplified aid — healing you apply to others restores +2 HP.

ward_circle.name: Ward Circle
ward_circle.desc: Circle warding — 10ft aura; allies +1 Magical Defence for 3 rounds (once per combat). + Harmony Reaction: overlapping circles (each Mage in the overlap adds +1 Magical Defence per Mage helping — count Mages, add that many once per Mage; 3 Mages → +9 Magical Defence; 5 Mages → +25 Magical Defence).

shared_focus.name: Shared Focus
shared_focus.desc: Arcane sustenance — once per combat, sustain one ally's concentration effect without spending your action (GM).

oathbound.name: Oathbound
oathbound.desc: Oathbound resolve — +1 Magical Defence; +2 on saves vs fear (GM).

lay_on_hands.name: Lay on Hands
lay_on_hands.desc: Lay on hands — touch an ally and restore 1d6+1 HP (once per ally per day).

rebuke.name: Rebuke
rebuke.desc: Rebuke a foe — one enemy hesitates; save or cannot use reactions until your next turn (once per combat).

bulwark.name: Bulwark
bulwark.desc: Holy protection — +1 Physical Defence while below half HP.

aura_of_protection.name: Aura of Protection
aura_of_protection.desc: Holy protection — allies within 10ft +1 Magical Defence vs fear and charm. + Harmony: +1 Magical Defence vs fear and charm per Paladin with this aura in range (no Reaction).

turn_shadow.name: Turn Shadow
turn_shadow.desc: Rebuke the unholy — ward 10ft; hostile undead or demons must save to enter (weaker than full Turn; once per combat).

sacred_stance.name: Sacred Stance
sacred_stance.desc: Holy protection — +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence until end of your next turn; you cannot move.

light_fingers.name: Light Fingers
light_fingers.desc: Pickpocket and filch — +2 on pickpocket and sleight-of-hand (GM).

slip_away.name: Slip Away
slip_away.desc: Slip away — disengage from melee without provoking opportunity attacks (once per combat).

shadow_blend.name: Shadow Blend
shadow_blend.desc: Shadow stealth — +1 to Stealth in light armour or none.

dirty_trick.name: Dirty Trick
dirty_trick.desc: Distraction setup — distract a foe; one ally gains +2 on next attack vs that target. + Harmony Reaction: same foe (each additional Thief adds +1 to that attack).

filch.name: Filch
filch.desc: Pickpocket and filch — steal one small unequipped item from a target (GM contested roll; once per encounter).

escape_artist.name: Escape Artist
escape_artist.desc: Slip away — +2 vs grapples, restraints, and mundane traps.

hit_and_run.name: Hit and Run
hit_and_run.desc: Slip away — after you deal damage, move 10ft without provoking opportunity attacks (once per turn).

battle_fury.name: Battle Fury
battle_fury.desc: Wounded fury — +1 damage on melee attacks while below half HP.

reckless_strike.name: Reckless Strike
reckless_strike.desc: Reckless assault — your next attack gains +2 damage; you suffer −2 Physical Defence until your next turn.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.desc: Battlefield intimidation — foes within 10ft save or suffer −1 accuracy for 1 round. + Harmony Reaction: same area (−1 accuracy per Berserker on failed save).

bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
bloodlust.desc: Wounded fury — on a kill or critical hit, regain 1 Stamina.

rage.name: Rage
rage.desc: Wounded fury — +2 Strength, −1 Magical Defence for 3 rounds (once per combat).

unstoppable.name: Unstoppable
unstoppable.desc: Reckless assault — ignore difficult terrain while moving toward a hostile target.

executioner.name: Executioner
executioner.desc: Coup de grace — +2 damage vs bloodied targets (GM: below half HP).

steady_hand.name: Steady Hand
steady_hand.desc: Steady aim — +1 accuracy with ranged weapon attacks.

overwatch.name: Overwatch
overwatch.desc: Overwatch shot — ready a shot; interrupt one enemy moving in your line of sight (GM).

suppressing_fire.name: Suppressing Fire
suppressing_fire.desc: Pinning shots into a zone — enemies suffer −1 to attacks or movement for 1 round. + Harmony Reaction: same zone (−1 penalty per Marksman).

quick_reload.name: Quick Reload
quick_reload.desc: Steady aim — ranged attacks cost 1 less Stamina (minimum 0).

called_shot.name: Called Shot
called_shot.desc: Steady aim — −2 to hit; on hit, +1d6 damage (once per target per combat).

volley_support.name: Volley Support
volley_support.desc: Marked for allies — allies gain +1 accuracy vs a target you damaged this round.

snap_shot.name: Snap Shot
snap_shot.desc: Steady aim — your first ranged attack each combat ignores half-cover penalties (GM).

precise_footwork.name: Precise Footwork
precise_footwork.desc: Dueling footwork — +1 Speed while wielding a one-handed weapon.

parry_riposte.name: Parry & Riposte
parry_riposte.desc: Parry and riposte — when hit by a melee attack, contest to negate damage once per round (GM).

feint.name: Feint
feint.desc: Feint and misdirection — your next attack vs one target: roll twice, keep the higher result (once per combat).

disengage_master.name: Disengage Master
disengage_master.desc: Dueling footwork — leaving melee does not provoke from one chosen foe per turn.

flourish.name: Flourish
flourish.desc: Parry and riposte — attack and force a save; on fail, target loses reactions until your next turn.

dueling_stance.name: Dueling Stance
dueling_stance.desc: Single-foe focus — +1 Physical Defence vs one chosen opponent until you change target.

finishing_thrust.name: Finishing Thrust
finishing_thrust.desc: Single-foe focus — +2 damage vs targets who have not yet acted this round.

fusion_ember_hearth.name: Ember Hearth
fusion_ember_hearth.desc: Craft (Hearty Provisions + Burning): Cook meals without a campfire. Meals you cook restore +1 HP.

fusion_glacier_pantry.name: Glacier Pantry
fusion_glacier_pantry.desc: Craft (Camp Provisioning + Preservation): Preserve food twice as long; chilled rations grant +1 Stamina when eaten.

fusion_field_spark.name: Field Spark
fusion_field_spark.desc: Action (Stabilise & Revive + Conductivity): Jump-start a downed ally — restore 1 HP and remove Stunned (once per target per day).

fusion_shadow_snatch.name: Shadow Snatch
fusion_shadow_snatch.desc: Action (Scene Examination + Concealment): Lift one small unequipped item from a target while they are distracted (GM contested roll). Once per long rest.

fusion_mirage_patter.name: Mirage Patter
fusion_mirage_patter.desc: Action (Witness Interrogation + Radiance): Weave a brief believable illusion into conversation (+2 social bluff; no combat decoys).

fusion_ward_meal.name: Ward Meal
fusion_ward_meal.desc: Craft (Hearty Provisions + Protective Warding): Blessed meal removes fear or charm when eaten (once per creature per day).

fusion_living_map.name: Living Map
fusion_living_map.desc: Passive (Wilderness Tracking + Divination): Once per day, sense the safest path through wilderness for 8 hours (GM navigation).

fusion_trap_runes.name: Trap Runes
fusion_trap_runes.desc: Craft (Snares & Ambush + Rune Inscription): Snares that trigger a minor rune (alarm + 1d4 magic damage).

fusion_alchemical_frost.name: Alchemical Frost
fusion_alchemical_frost.desc: Craft (Volatile Brews + Preservation): Flash-freeze vials — utility slow, no direct spell damage.

fusion_beast_whisper.name: Beast Whisper
fusion_beast_whisper.desc: Calm one hostile beast for 1 minute (GM save).

alchemist_explosive_compounds.name: Explosive Compounds
alchemist_explosive_compounds.desc: Bombs (3d6 in 15ft; separate attack roll per target vs MD).

minstrels_voice.name: Minstrel's Voice
minstrels_voice.desc: Sing any Musician skill without an instrument. With an off-hand instrument equipped: your songs last longer, you count as 2 Musicians for your part (at uncommon+ instruments), and allies get +1 extra from your song (rare+ instruments — see item tooltip).

marching_tune.name: Marching Tune
marching_tune.desc: Sustained performance — up to 2 turns (4 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 Speed per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 initiative for listeners while sustained).

soothing_hymn.name: Soothing Hymn
soothing_hymn.desc: Allied ballad — sustain up to 2 turns (4 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 Magical Defence per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 Stamina at the start of each listener's turn while sustained).

battle_anthem.name: Battle Anthem
battle_anthem.desc: Allied ballad — sustain up to 3 turns (6 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 accuracy per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 damage on next hit per Musician while sustained).

dissonant_note.name: Dissonant Note
dissonant_note.desc: Enemy dissonance — sustain 1 turn (4 Stamina once); enemies in hearing range −1 accuracy per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (−1 per Musician on enemy saves while sustained).

long_set.name: Long Set
long_set.desc: Sustained performance — your songs may last 1 extra turn (e.g. Work Song up to 4 turns).

marching_tune_buff.name: Marching Tune
marching_tune_buff.desc: Allies in hearing range +1 Speed per performing Musician (+1 initiative per harmony joiner).

soothing_hymn_buff.name: Soothing Hymn
soothing_hymn_buff.desc: Allies in hearing range +1 Magical Defence per performing Musician (+1 Stamina at turn start per harmony joiner).

battle_anthem_buff.name: Battle Anthem
battle_anthem_buff.desc: Allies in hearing range +1 accuracy per performing Musician (+1 damage on next hit per harmony joiner).

dissonant_note_debuff.name: Dissonant Note
dissonant_note_debuff.desc: Enemies in hearing range −1 accuracy per performing Musician (−1 on saves per harmony joiner).

work_song.name: Work Song
work_song.desc: Sustained performance — up to 3 turns (5 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 Strength per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 Physical Defence per Musician while sustained; e.g. 6 Musicians → +6 Strength and +6 Physical Defence). Sing without an instrument; off-hand instruments amplify (see glossary Instrument amplify).

work_song_buff.name: Work Song
work_song_buff.desc: Allies in hearing range +1 Strength per performing Musician (+1 Physical Defence per harmony joiner).

encore.name: Encore
encore.desc: Sustained performance — once per combat, play the same song again for free, but only for its original length (no Long Set, instrument, or other bonus turns).

fusion_wild_calm.name: Wild Calm
fusion_wild_calm.desc: Action (Wilderness Tracking + Harmony): Calm one hostile beast for 1 minute (GM save).

temp_strength.name: Temp Strength
temp_strength.desc: +Potency Strength while active. Set duration and potency from the item or skill (e.g. potency 3, 8 turns).

temp_magic.name: Temp Magic
temp_magic.desc: +Potency Magic Power while active. Set duration and potency from the item or skill.

temp_speed.name: Temp Speed
temp_speed.desc: +Potency Speed while active. Set duration and potency from the item or skill.

temp_defense.name: Temp Defense
temp_defense.desc: +Potency Physical Defence and +Potency Magical Defence while active. Negative potency lowers both (e.g. −2 from a reckless attack).

cold_immunity.name: Cold Immunity
cold_immunity.desc: Immune to cold damage and ice Immobilized while active. Set duration from the item or skill.
